meta.name: space-station
meta.description: A sci-fi space station, authored Y-up (glTF convention) and confirmed in Blender: a rotating habitation ring, central hub with spokes, a docking port, dual solar arrays on a mast, and a steerable comm dish. The reference for a large multi-mesh threed scene: one scene node, a shared material palette, and many mesh + object nodes assembled from procedurally generated geometry.
